categories.name: Getting started
categories.purpose: Time-ordered orientation and first actions for beginning or restarting life in the Netherlands.
categories.home_rules: Show incomplete or urgent next actions; maximum two non-emergency cards.
categories.search_rules: Boost first-step intent and synonyms; never suppress other categories.
categories.map_rules: Only related coordinate-bearing services appear; checklists and articles link from callouts.

categories.name: Housing
categories.purpose: Finding, registering, paying for and safely keeping a home.
categories.home_rules: Recommend by declared task or saved journey; never hide from non-newcomers.
categories.search_rules: Index legal Dutch terms, common English/Russian aliases and official-service names.
categories.map_rules: Show housing help desks, municipalities and service places only when coordinates are verified.

categories.name: Official services
categories.purpose: Canonical access to government processes, documents, institutions and trusted sources.
categories.home_rules: Show deadline-driven or journey-relevant services and verified status reminders.
categories.search_rules: Official names and acronyms receive exact-match boost; source freshness is visible.
categories.map_rules: Show verified public offices and service points; national digital services remain Guide/Search only.

categories.name: Work and money
categories.purpose: Employment, income, tax, banking and entrepreneurship guidance.
categories.home_rules: Rank for worker/entrepreneur signals and active deadlines; do not exclude for other audiences.
categories.search_rules: Connect colloquial queries to Dutch legal and payroll terms; deduplicate by canonical ID.
categories.map_rules: Show employment desks, tax offices and verified partner places only.

categories.name: Study
categories.purpose: Education, childcare, student administration, language and civic learning.
categories.home_rules: Recommend current course, student tasks or family education tasks.
categories.search_rules: Index course modules, DUO terminology, levels and multilingual learning aliases.
categories.map_rules: Show schools, libraries, language centers and student service locations when verified.

categories.name: Health and safety
categories.purpose: Routine care, urgent help, personal safety and trusted support.
categories.home_rules: Emergency action is always available; otherwise rank by active journey and locality.
categories.search_rules: Urgent terms bypass ordinary ranking and open safe canonical actions with official sources.
categories.map_rules: Show verified emergency and care places; never infer availability from stale data.

categories.name: Transport
categories.purpose: Public transport, cycling, driving and national/international mobility.
categories.home_rules: Recommend current-city and saved-route guidance, not a full transport catalog.
categories.search_rules: Index OV/NS acronyms, ticket products, stations and common route questions.
categories.map_rules: Map is the primary spatial projection for stations, stops, parking and mobility places.

categories.name: Explore
categories.purpose: Country orientation, culture, history, events, food and places to visit.
categories.home_rules: Show at most one contextual discovery module after priority tasks.
categories.search_rules: Search entities and editorial material separately but merge results by canonical ID.
categories.map_rules: Coordinate-bearing places/cities/provinces appear; nonspatial culture articles remain linked context.
